nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 普洛格山
nodes.summary: 普洛格山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括呂宋八色鶇、White-browed jungle flycatcher、Luzon water redstart，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 呂宋八色鶇
nodes.summary: 呂宋八色鶇（Whiskered pitta，学名 Erythropitta kochi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.evidence: It occurs in a number of protected areas, including the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Mount Pulag Natural Park, [[Mt

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forest and tropical moist montane forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and trapping. It is one of the most sought after birds by birdwatchers in the Philippines.{{Cite web|last=Wild Bird Club of the Philippines|title=Whiskered Pitta, the Philippines' rarest endemic pitta, has been recently discovered thriving in Mt

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is also threatened by hunting in snare traps
